/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O2 -msse2  -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -shared  -o _cuda_akaze.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/_cuda_akaze.dir/akaze_bindings.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64: libakaze_core.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
